about.heading: about the station
about.body:
QWRT Radio is an artist-first radio station built to spotlight independent musicians and help listeners discover new songs. Usually songs are being played from a shuffled playlist, featuring emerging artists. In some point we plan on having DJs featured as well.

If you are on mobile, the player will be muted by default so unmute it with the 🔇 button.

contact.heading: get in touch
contact.body:
Email us at hello@qwrt.online for inquiries or collaboration opportunities. As we are currently in the scouting phase, we are looking to connect with artists, DJs, and potential partners.

Please also let us know if there are any functional errors with the site or if you have any feedbackw.

updates.heading: updates
updates.body: Here we will post updates about our schedule, new artist features, and maintenance. Stay tuned!
